Dr. Lin stood before the console. Screens flickered with data streams representing the flow of existence. She pushed a lever labeled 'Adjust Rate'. The hum of the machine pitched lower.

In that instant, she was slowing down time.

The world around her blurred into static streaks. Dust particles hung suspended in the air like frozen jewels. Light bent around corners that were no longer visible.

This process of slowing down time required immense power. The energy gauge spiked dangerously red.

Lin held her breath. Her reflection remained sharp in the glass while the background faded away.

She feared the consequences of slowing down time on reality itself.

The lights dimmed to darkness. Silence filled the room.<|im_end|>
